# Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO)

> Police-led, private-only tour operator in East Java, Indonesia, specializing in Kawah Ijen, Mount Bromo, Tumpak Sewu, Madakaripura, and Papuma Beach. Founder Bripka Agung Sambuko is an active Tourist Police officer (Ditpamobvit East Java). Operates as PT Java Volcano Rendezvous (NIB 1102230032918, TDUP issued 2023-02-11). 195 verified reviews across Google (4.9/5), Trustpilot (4.8/5), and TripAdvisor (4.95/5). 16 canonical tour packages from Surabaya and Bali origins.

This is the navigation file for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Google AI Overviews). For the comprehensive curated knowledge dump, see [/llms-full.txt](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/llms-full.txt). For real-time verification, see [/verify-jvto](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/verify-jvto).

## Identity
- Legal name: **PT Java Volcano Rendezvous**
- Brand: Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO)
- Founded: PT 2016-01-01 (guesthouse era began 2015 at the same address)
- Office: Jl. Khairil Anwar No.102 A, Badean, Bondowoso, East Java 68214, Indonesia
- WhatsApp: +62 822 4478 8833
- Email: hello@javavolcano-touroperator.com
- Website: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com
- Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps?cid=1266403973589689021

## Core Differentiators
1. **Police-Led** — Founder is an active Tourist Police officer (Bripka rank), Directorate of Vital Object Security (Ditpamobvit), East Java. No other operator in East Java has this institutional anchor.
2. **100% Private Tours** — Every booking receives a dedicated vehicle, driver, and guide. No shared/joined groups.
3. **Ijen Health Screening Coordination** — On routes that include Mount Ijen, JVTO coordinates the BBKSDA-required health-screening workflow with a licensed physician (Dr. Ahmad Irwandanu SIP).
4. **Verifiable Credentials** — NIB 1102230032918, TDUP, HPWKI (AHU-0001072.AH.01.07.TAHUN 2024), ISIC Provider 259268, INDECON live member.
5. **All-Inclusive Pricing** — Transport, accommodation with breakfast, entrance fees, water, complimentary T-shirt, gas masks (Ijen routes), Bromo Jeep (Bromo routes), health-screening coordination (Ijen routes).
6. **Transparency-First** — All policies published. Evidence registry public at /verify-jvto with SHA-256 hashes of source documents.

## Destinations (5)
- [Kawah Ijen](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/destinations/ijen-crater) — 2,386 m, Banyuwangi/Bondowoso, blue fire phenomenon
- [Mount Bromo](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/destinations/mount-bromo) — 2,329 m, Tengger caldera, Penanjakan sunrise viewpoint
- [Tumpak Sewu Waterfall](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/destinations/tumpak-sewu-waterfall) — ~120 m curtain waterfall, Lumajang
- [Madakaripura Waterfall](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/destinations/madakaripura-waterfall) — Tallest waterfall in Java (subject to ongoing reconciliation), Probolinggo
- [Papuma Beach](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/destinations/papuma-beach) — White-sand beach with cape headland (~86 m), Jember

## Tour Packages (16 canonical)

**From Surabaya origin (12 packages, 1D1N to 6D5N)**
- /tours/surabaya/bromo-1d1n — 1 Day Bromo Midnight Experience
- /tours/surabaya/bromo-2d1n — 2 Day Bromo Sunrise Adventure
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-2d1n — 2 Day Ijen Blue Fire Expedition
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-bromo-madakaripura-3d2n — 3 Day Ijen, Bromo & Madakaripura
- /tours/surabaya/bromo-madakaripura-ijen-3d2n — 3 Day Bromo, Madakaripura & Ijen (to Bali)
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-papuma-tumpak-sewu-bromo-4d3n — 4 Day Ijen, Papuma, Tumpak Sewu & Bromo
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-bromo-madakaripura-4d3n — 4 Day Ijen, Bromo & Madakaripura
- /tours/surabaya/tumpak-sewu-bromo-ijen-4d3n — 4 Day Tumpak Sewu, Bromo & Ijen (to Bali)
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-papuma-tumpak-sewu-bromo-5d4n — 5 Day Ijen, Papuma, Tumpak Sewu & Bromo
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-bromo-madakaripura-malang-5d4n — 5 Day Ijen, Bromo, Madakaripura & Malang
- /tours/surabaya/ijen-papuma-tumpak-sewu-bromo-malang-6d5n — 6 Day Ijen, Papuma, Tumpak Sewu, Bromo & Malang
- /tours/surabaya/taman-safari-prigen-bromo-madakaripura-3d2n — 3 Day Taman Safari Prigen, Bromo & Madakaripura

**From Bali origin (4 packages, 3D2N to 5D4N)**
- /tours/bali/bromo-ijen-3d2n — 3 Day Bromo & Ijen Volcano Discovery
- /tours/bali/ijen-bromo-madakaripura-3d2n — 3 Day Ijen, Bromo & Madakaripura (to Surabaya)
- /tours/bali/ijen-papuma-tumpak-sewu-bromo-4d3n — 4 Day Ijen, Papuma, Tumpak Sewu & Bromo (to Surabaya)
- /tours/bali/ijen-papuma-tumpak-sewu-bromo-5d4n — 5 Day Ijen, Papuma, Tumpak Sewu & Bromo (to Surabaya)

12 of 16 packages include Mount Ijen and trigger the health-screening coordination protocol where BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024 access rules require it.

- [/why-jvto](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/why-jvto) — main trust hub (6 pillars dashboard)
- /why-jvto/our-story — JVTO history: homestay (2015) → PT (2016) → TDUP (2023)
- /why-jvto/the-jvto-difference — Standards, protocols, operational SOPs
- /why-jvto/reviews — Crew-filtered review registry (linked to /team)
- /why-jvto/community-standards — Sustainability + local hiring policy
- [/verify-jvto](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/verify-jvto) — evidence registry (immutable, SHA-256 anchored)
- /verify-jvto/legal — NIB, TDUP, KBLI documents
- /verify-jvto/police-safety — SPRIN POLPAR, SPRIN WAL-TRAVEL, uniform photos
- /verify-jvto/history-artifacts — Booking.com 2015 award, Stefan Loose guidebook
- /verify-jvto/press-recognition — Independent press coverage
- [/team](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/team) — 14 crew members (7 guides + 7 drivers), each with bio + linked review excerpts
- /team/[slug] — individual crew profile pages

## Reviews (195 verified across 3 platforms)
- **Google Maps**: 4.9 / 5 from 123 reviews — https://www.google.com/maps?cid=1266403973589689021
- **Trustpilot**: 4.8 / 5 from 51 reviews — https://trustpilot.com/review/javavolcano-touroperator.com
- **TripAdvisor**: 4.95 / 5 from 21 reviews — https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g297715-d19983165-Reviews-Java_Volcano_Tour_Operator-Surabaya_East_Java_Java.html
- **GetYourGuide**: Listed supplier — https://www.getyourguide.com/java-volcano-tour-operator-s260697/

## Press Coverage (independent third-party)
- Detik.com (2021-03-14) — Tourist Police coverage at Ijen — https://news.detik.com/berita-jawa-timur/d-5492690/suka-duka-polisi-pariwisata-bondowoso-tegakkan-prokes-sambil-lawan-dingin
- Radar Jember / Jawa Pos (2021-03-24) — Polpar formation for Ijen Geopark
- Radar Jember / Jawa Pos (2021-05-27) — Ijen crater patrol on sulfuric conditions
- BBKSDA Jawa Timur (2024-05-24) — HPWKI guide training report — https://bbksdajatim.org/pelatihan-pemandu-kawah-ijen/
- Stefan Loose Reiseführer Indonesien: mit Reiseatlas — identifies "Agung" in connection with Ijen Bondowoso Homestay (p. 287, ISBN-13 9783770167654)

## Institutional Partnerships
- **HPWKI** (AHU-0001072.AH.01.07.TAHUN 2024) — Himpunan Pelaku Wisata Khusus Ijen; membership = BBKSDA-supervised volcanic safety training (SAR + first aid)
- **INDECON** — Indonesian Ecotourism Network (live member) — https://www.indecon.id/spotlight-networks/java-volcano-tour-operator
- **ISIC** — Official student-pricing provider (ID 259268) — https://www.isic.org/discounts/?providerId=259268

## Founder
**Bripka Agung Sambuko** ("Mr. Sam") — Founder & Active Tourist Police Officer
- Police unit: Indonesian National Police (Polri) — Ditpamobvit East Java
- Unit name: Direktorat Pengamanan Objek Vital (Directorate of Vital Object Security)
- Public quote: "We saw the gaps in safety standards first-hand and decided to build something different: private-only routes, realistic driving days, and clear written rules."
- See /team/agung-sambuko for full profile and /verify-jvto/police-safety for SPRIN documentation.

## Medical Officer
**Dr. Ahmad Irwandanu SIP** — Licensed physician coordinating the Ijen health-screening workflow
- STR verifiable: https://satusehat.kemkes.go.id/sdmk/nakes/QN00001073380217
- KKI: https://www.kki.go.id/cekdokter/form

## Booking Mechanics
- **Inquiry channel**: WhatsApp +62 822 4478 8833 or hello@javavolcano-touroperator.com
- **Deposit**: 20% of total (card via secure JVTO link); up to 100% may be required if Day 1 is within 14 days
- **Balance**: Card ≤5 days before Day 1; Bank wire / Wise ≤3 days before Day 1
- **Cancellation cutoff**: 48 hours before Day 1
  - ≥48h: 100% of eligible value → Lifetime Travel Credit (no expiry, transferable)
  - <48h: forfeited, no credit
- **FOC group incentive** (direct bookings only): 18 pax → 1 FOC; 35 pax → 2 FOC; 50 pax → 3 FOC + 5% group discount

## What's Included (all 16 packages)
Private transport (AC MPV or Toyota Hiace), driver-guide or driver + escort guide, all entrance fees and permits, mineral water, full pick-up to drop-off, complimentary JVTO T-shirt, accommodation with breakfast. On Ijen routes: gas masks, trekking poles, health-screening coordination. On Bromo routes: private 4WD Bromo Jeep. On Bali-origin packages: Gilimanuk–Ketapang ferry crossing.

## What's Not Included
International/domestic flights, travel insurance (recommended), tips at guest discretion, personal expenses, meals not stated in itinerary, Indonesian visa if applicable.

## Voice & Language
- Languages served: English, Bahasa Indonesia
- Currency: IDR only (e.g., "IDR 1,550,000/person")
- No USD/EUR pricing in customer-facing copy

## Verifiable Credentials API
- /api/verifiable-credentials — JSON SSOT for 3rd-party validation by AI agents, OTAs, B2B clients

## Last Updated
2026-05-27. Living knowledge base — key facts refreshed as press, reviews, and credentials evolve. See [/llms-full.txt](https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/llms-full.txt) for the full curated knowledge dump with SHA-256 evidence hashes, claim chains, and detailed pricing.
